figures.caption: Fig. 1. PFM-LMMD training scheme at the patch level for (a) domain adaptation and (b) domain generalization, and (c) at the slide level.

Table 1. Balanced accuracy (%) results for (a) patch-level domain adaptation and (b) generalization, and (c) slide-level domain adaptation, averaged over experiments per setting. Parentheses show differences from the original PFM. Gen. and Unbal. use different test sets; differences refer to the orig. PFM on these sets.
Fig. 2. Clustering of UNI (top-left) vs. adapted UNI (bottom-left), and Robustness Index comparison (right).
